title: paraixeris serotina
intro: Paraixeris serotina, also known as late-flowering paraixeris, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiviral properties. Paraixeris serotina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its potential medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
